name: secure-code-reviewer
description: Security review and safe dependency maintenance for Node.js, Angular, Ionic Angular, React/Vite, Express, and NestJS projects.

interface.shortDescription: Security review and dependency risk triage.
interface.longDescription: Run conservative, read-only security reviews for JavaScript and TypeScript codebases, report package vulnerabilities and unsafe frontend/backend patterns, and plan incremental fixes before any code changes begin.
defaultPrompt: Use $secure-code-reviewer to review this project for security risks.
Use $secure-code-reviewer to plan safe dependency updates.
